title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 521.490 - Effect of dissolution
text:
521.490.  Effect of dissolution. — When any attachment shall be dissolved, all proceedings touching the property and effects attached, and the garnishee summoned, shall be vacated, and the suit shall proceed as if it had been commenced by summons only.
(RSMo 1939 § 1486) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1322; 1919 § 1773; 1909 § 2342
